magnesium-bisglycinate.title: High Potency Magnesium Bisglycinate
magnesium-bisglycinate.description: Magnesium Bisglycinate is now 40% more potent with a higher level of elemental magnesium per capsule. Providing 100% pure magnesium bisglycinate, there are no other compounds or forms of magnesium. This new breakthrough formulation is fully reacted which means every molecule of magnesium is bound to glycine. This creates pure magnesium bisglycinate and eliminates all other forms of magnesium. The maximum amount of elemental magnesium from magnesium bisglycinate that can fit in a capsule is 100mg, making this Viridian supplement the highest potency, pure magnesium bisglycinate available. Each dose of 2 capsules contains 1668mg of magnesium bisglycinate of which 200mg is elemental magnesium. Magnesium bisglycinate is absorbed differently to other forms of magnesium. The glycine means it is recognised in the digestive system as an amino acid and therefore can be absorbed at a different stage. This potentially results in less competition with other minerals for absorption, therefore increasing the bioavailability. Magnesium supports over 300 processes in the body and is known as the spark of life. It contributes to a reduction of tiredness and fatigue, supports electrolyte balance, the nervous system, normal muscle function, normal psychological function and the maintenance of normal bones and teeth. This pure magnesium bisglycinate supplement contains 100% active ingredients, formulated by expert nutritionists with no artificial fillers and no nasties. Sourced according to Viridian’s strict ethical criteria including no animal testing, GMO or palm oil.

high-potency-magnesium-300mg.title: High Potency Magnesium
high-potency-magnesium-300mg.description: Involved in over 300 processes in the human body, magnesium is often referred to as the ‘spark of life’. Amongst other things, magnesium contributes to a reduction of tiredness and fatigue, and supports electrolyte balance, the nervous system, normal muscle function, normal psychological function and the maintenance of normal bones and teeth. Although Magnesium can be obtained through dietary sources, modern diets with higher levels of processed foods are less likely to contain sufficient levels of vitamins and minerals. Furthermore, intensive farming practices have reduced magnesium levels in the soil by up to 40% meaning that our foods are less nutritionally dense than they previously were. With 300mg of magnesium per capsule, this supplement is an easy way to increase your magnesium intake to support optimal wellbeing. In this vegan formulation, magnesium is provided in three different forms: oxide, citrate and bisglycinate in order to deliver the most effective high-strength dose in a bioavailable form. Contains 100% active ingredients, formulated by expert nutritionists with no artificial fillers and no nasties. Sourced according to Viridian’s strict ethical criteria including no animal testing, GMO or palm oil. Just to make you aware we are currently updating our packaging so your supplement may look a little different. Please don't worry, it's the same goodness inside.

high-twelve-b-complex.title: High Twelve B-Complex
high-twelve-b-complex.description: Each of the Viridian B-complex supplements offers a full array of the B vitamins together with a higher level of a featured B vitamin. This supplement features a higher levels of vitamin B12, an essential nutrient which has been proven to help reduce tiredness and fatigue and contributes to normal function of the immune system. B complex vitamins (B1, B2, B3, B5, B6 & B12) along with biotin, folic acid and choline all provide a vital role in maintaining good health and well-being. Together they contribute to the reduction of tiredness and fatigue, normal psychological function and mental performance, energy-yielding metabolism, the regulation of hormonal activity, the functioning of the immune and nervous systems and the maintenance of normal skin, vision and red blood cells. B complex vitamins also contribute to the protection of cells from oxidative stress. Contains 100% active ingredients, formulated by expert nutritionists with no artificial fillers and no nasties. Sourced according to Viridian’s strict ethical criteria including no animal testing, GMO or palm oil. high-five-multivitamin.title: High Five Multivitamin Formula
high-five-multivitamin.description: One-a-day best-selling multivitamin and mineral from Viridian Nutrition. The ‘High Five’ refers to the higher level of Vitamin B5 (pantothenic acid) found in this formula. Vitamin B5 contributes to normal mental performance and a reduction in tiredness and fatigue. Vitamin B5 also contributes to the normal synthesis and metabolism of steroid hormones, vitamin D and some neurotransmitters. This supplement also features buffered vitamin C, vegan vitamin D, natural source carotenoids, balanced B-complex, fully-reacted chelated minerals including selenium, chromium, iron and zinc. Selenium contributes to normal maintenance of hair and nails, the normal function of the immune system, normal thyroid function and for the protection of cells from oxidative stress. This ‘oxidative stress’ appears to be a major factor in many human diseases. Chromium contributes to the maintenance of normal blood glucose levels. This formula contains iron bisglycinate, a form of iron that is gentle on the digestive system. Iron contributes to the reduction of tiredness and fatigue and contributes to normal cognitive function. It is also essential for the healthy production of haemoglobin and red blood cells. Zinc is a mineral essential to many body processes including the maintenance of normal cognitive function, vision, fertility and reproduction, hair, skin and nails and the immune system. Zinc also contributes to the normal metabolism of fatty acids and macronutrients. Contains 100% active ingredients, formulated by expert nutritionists with no artificial fillers and no nasties. Sourced according to Viridian’s strict ethical criteria including no animal testing, GMO or palm oil. Just to make you aware we are currently updating our packaging so your supplement may look a little different. Please don't worry, it's the same goodness inside.

vitamin-d3.title: Vitamin D3 2000iu
vitamin-d3.description: Vitamin D is often referred to as ‘the sunshine vitamin’ as it is naturally produced under the skin following exposure to sunlight. During winter periods we can’t make vitamin D from sunlight because the sun is too low in the sky. Because it’s difficult to get enough vitamin D from food, Public Health England recommend supplementation of vitamin D to maintain bone and muscle health. Whereas most vitamin D3 supplements on the market are derived from the lanolin in sheep’s wool, Viridian Vitamin D3 capsules provide vitamin D3 in a vegan form derived from lichen. Viridian D3 has been clinically studied at the University of Surrey and proven to increase blood serum levels of vitamin D. Vitamin D contributes to the maintenance of normal bones, teeth, muscle function and immune function. Vitamin D also contributes to normal absorption/utilisation of calcium and phosphorus. Contains 100% active ingredients, formulated by expert nutritionists with no artificial fillers and no nasties. Sourced according to Viridian’s strict ethical criteria including no animal testing, GMO or palm oil. Just to make you aware we are currently updating our packaging so your supplement may look a little different. Please don't worry, it's the same goodness inside.

extra-c.title: Extra C 950mg
extra-c.description: Extra C is a high potency, highly effective and absorbable form of vitamin C. Vitamin C is an essential nutrient for the body. It is crucial for the normal function of the immune system and is required for the normal operation of many structures in the body including, bones, teeth and gums. It also supports skin by contributing to normal collagen formation and contributes to the protection of cells from oxidative stress. In addition, vitamin C helps maintain normal energy levels and psychological function. In this clinically researched formulation, the addition of lipid metabolites enhances the bioavailability of vitamin C, meaning that it can be more rapidly absorbed - and subsequently retained - by the human body than other traditional forms. The result is an increase in the distribution of vitamin C to the cells helping to deliver optimal levels. Contains 100% active ingredients, formulated by expert nutritionists with no artificial fillers and no nasties. Sourced according to Viridian’s strict ethical criteria including no animal testing, GMO or palm oil. Just to make you aware we are currently updating our packaging so your supplement may look a little different. Please don't worry, it's the same goodness inside.

synbiotic-daily.title: Synerbio Daily
synbiotic-daily.description: Synerbio Daily is an expert formulation comprising good gut bacteria with added ‘prebiotics’. The unique Prebiotic FS2-60 offers full-spectrum prebiotic oligosaccharide and plant derived inulin. FS2-60 is not digested but is utilised by the friendly flora to increase colonisation of Lactobacilli and the Bifidobacteria whilst reducing the foothold of unfriendly species. The human gut is home to an immense population of bacteria. Some 100 trillion bacteria populate the human gut, a number that is 10 times greater than the number of cells in the human body. Because of the sheer size and importance of the gut bacteria, this microbial population can be viewed as a bacterial organ, about the size of your liver and just as important to support and protect. Good for replenishing the digestive system after a bout of illness or medication whilst being gentle enough for daily support. We recommend taking alongside a multivitamin and an oil to form a foundation for good health. Contains 100% active ingredients formulated by expert nutritionists with no artificial fillers and no nasties. Sourced according to Viridian’s strict ethical criteria including no animal testing, GMO or palm oil. Just to make you aware we are currently updating our packaging so your supplement may look a little different. Please don't worry, it's the same goodness inside.

balanced-zinc-complex.title: Balanced Zinc Complex
balanced-zinc-complex.description: Highly absorbable, synergistic balance of key nutrients involved in immune maintenance and skin health. This formula also includes copper and beta carotene for optimum absorption and utilisation. Zinc is a mineral that is found in every cell of the body and is a component in over 200 enzymes. Its myriad of proven health benefits for the human body include supporting immunity and cognitive functions, as well as helping to keep bones, eyes, skin, hair and nails in good condition. Zinc also contributes to normal fertility and reproductive health in men and women. Foods typically high in zinc include meat, shellfish, dairy foods and wholegrain products. Zinc is not stored by the body, so having a regular intake of this mineral is important. The inclusion of beta carotene in this supplement enables the body to produce vitamin A which enhances synergy for supporting immune function, along with visual, skin and reproductive health. Copper has been added to ensure the appropriate ratio of zinc to copper is maintained within the body to enable the effective absorption of both minerals. Contains 100% active ingredients, formulated by expert nutritionists with no artificial fillers and no nasties. Sourced according to Viridian’s strict ethical criteria including no animal testing, GMO or palm oil. Just to make you aware we are currently updating our packaging so your supplement may look a little different. Please don't worry, it's the same goodness inside.

electrolyte-fix.title: Electrolyte Fix Liquid
electrolyte-fix.description: Refuel your liquids, support muscles and aid recovery without any added carbs, sugars, or any artificial ingredients. Electrolyte Fix contains four essential electrolytes – magnesium, which contributes to electrolyte balance as well as a reduction of tiredness and fatigue, potassium, which contributes to normal muscle function, sodium and chloride. Electrolyte Fix instantly turns water or any beverage into an electrolyte-fuelled drink. Viridian’s Electrolyte Fix is an intense electrolyte liquid, sourced from the Great Salt Lake, Utah in the USA. Electrolytes are mineral salts which are present in the body’s blood, fluid, and tissues. They carry an electric charge and therefore can affect the blood’s pH and muscle function. Mineral salts include sodium, chloride, magnesium and potassium and these are involved in balancing the fluid throughout the body including the volume of fluid within the blood. Water movement is controlled by the concentration of electrolytes on either side of the cell membrane. Heat and exercise increase fluid loss through sweat, which if not replaced leads to dehydration. This in turn impairs performance as blood volume decreases and body temperature increases, thus putting extra strain on the heart and lungs. The loss of fluid will also lead to an electrolyte imbalance as sodium and potassium are lost through the skin. This imbalance can cause a disruption to the cell’s ability to carry electrical charges. Viridian’s Electrolyte fix contains all the necessary electrolytes in an ionic form as well as all other minerals naturally present in sea water. Contains 100% active ingredients, formulated by expert nutritionists with no artificial fillers and no nasties. Sourced according to Viridian’s strict ethical criteria including no animal testing, GMO or palm oil. Just to make you aware we are currently updating our packaging so your supplement may look a little different. Please don't worry, it's the same goodness inside.

high-potency-b12.title: High Potency Vitamin B12
high-potency-b12.description: Vitamin B12 is an essential nutrient which has been proven to help reduce tiredness and fatigue and contributes to normal function of the immune system. Essential nutrients cannot be made by the body, but instead must come from diet or supplementation. Foods that are naturally rich in B12 include meat, fish, dairy products and some fortified foods. This supplement is an effective way to boost B12 levels, especially for those following a vegan or vegetarian diet. This high-strength formulation provides active vitamin B12 as both methylcobalamin and adenosylcobalamin. These 2 different active forms work synergistically, playing vital roles in energy production, healthy blood cell formation and functioning of the nervous system. Each capsule provides 1000μg and is as effective as sublingual B12. Contains 100% active ingredients, formulated by expert nutritionists with no artificial fillers and no nasties. Sourced according to Viridian’s strict ethical criteria including no animal testing, GMO or palm oil. Just to make you aware we are currently updating our packaging so your supplement may look a little different. Please don't worry, it's the same goodness inside.

balanced-iron-complex.title: Balanced Iron Complex
balanced-iron-complex.description: Iron is a mineral that is essential for the healthy production of haemoglobin and red blood cells. Balanced Iron Complex contains iron bisglycinate, a form of iron that is gentle on the digestive system. This formula also includes synergistic vitamin C to enhance iron absorption and aid in the maintenance of the immune system alongside vitamin B12 - an essential nutrient which contributes to normal energy-yielding metabolism and red blood cell formation, supporting the role of iron within the body. Iron contributes to the reduction of tiredness and fatigue and contributes to normal cognitive function. Foods typically high in iron include red meat, shellfish, pumpkin seeds, and spinach. However, according to the World Health Organization, iron is the nutrient that both women and men are most likely to be deficient in. Low iron levels could lead to feelings of fatigue, dizziness and weakness - symptoms which are often compounded by the menstrual cycle or from following a vegan or vegetarian diet. The iron used in this formula is a chelated form of this important nutrient, which has been bound to the amino acid glycine to make it more bioavailable and easier on the stomach than other commonly available forms such as ferrous fumarate or ferrous sulfate. Contains 100% active ingredients, formulated by expert nutritionists with no artificial fillers and no nasties. Sourced according to Viridian’s strict ethical criteria including no animal testing, GMO or palm oil. Just to make you aware we are currently updating our packaging so your supplement may look a little different.Please don't worry, it's the same goodness inside.

vitamin-k2.title: Vitamin K2
vitamin-k2.description: There are three types of vitamin K: K1 is obtained from food, K2 is produced by intestinal bacteria and K3 is a synthetic form. Vitamin K2 (menaquinone) is a fat-soluble vitamin primarily found in dairy products and fermented foods such as fermented cheese, yoghurt, natto and sauerkraut. Vitamin K2 contributes to the maintenance of normal bones as it is important for helping to transport calcium away from being deposited into soft tissues and instead into supporting bone health. Viridian Nutrition’s Vitamin K2 is extracted in Italy from fermented Bacillus subtilis natto cultures in a unique process and guaranteed non-animal tested. This vegan capsule from Viridian Nutrition is an easy way to help support your daily intake. Contains 100% active ingredients formulated by expert nutritionists with no artificial fillers and no nasties. Sourced according to Viridian’s strict ethical criteria including no animal testing, GMO or palm oil. Just to make you aware we are currently updating our packaging so your supplement may look a little different. Please don't worry, it's the same goodness inside.

vitamin-d3-k2.title: Vitamin D3 & K2
vitamin-d3-k2.description: Vitamin D3 & K2 is a balanced combination of two essential nutrients. Vitamin D and K contribute to the maintenance of normal bones, and vitamin D also contributes to the maintenance of normal muscle function, normal teeth and the function of the immune system. Vitamin D is often referred to as ‘the sunshine vitamin’ as it is naturally produced under the skin following exposure to sunlight. During winter periods we can’t make vitamin D from sunlight because the sun is too low in the sky. Because it’s difficult to get enough vitamin D from food, Public Health England recommends supplementation of vitamin D to maintain bone and muscle health. This formulation features an advanced form of vegan vitamin D3 that has been plant sourced from lichen and clinically trialled at the University of Surrey. The non-animal tested K2 is naturally derived from fermented natto cultures. Vitamin K contributes to normal blood clotting and can be found in fermented foods and animal products, and is also produced by gut bacteria. Vitamin K2 works synergistically with D3 and these two essential nutrients are in forms which are optimally absorbed by the body. Contains 100% active ingredients formulated by expert nutritionists with no artificial fillers and no nasties. Sourced according to Viridian’s strict ethical criteria including no animal testing, GMO or palm oil. organic-turmeric.title: Organic Turmeric 400mg
organic-turmeric.description: Turmeric ( Curcuma longa ) is a perennial herb of the ginger family that is extensively cultivated in India, China, Indonesia, and other tropical countries. This revered spice has a long history of use stemming from Ayurvedic practice and is still used widely across the world today to address a variety of ailments, including contributing to joint health and digestive comfort. Cultivated in Southern India on a small-scale farm, Viridian’s curcumin is sustainably sourced. Viridian’s turmeric capsules have been certified to meet the Soil Association’s exacting standards for organic food and farming. The turmeric has been organically grown by avoiding the use of chemical sprays or artificial fertilisers. Organic farming is kinder to the environment, better for you and works to supports smaller growers in the food supply chain. Contains 100% active ingredients, formulated by expert nutritionists with no artificial fillers and no nasties. Sourced according to Viridian’s strict ethical criteria including no animal testing, GMO or palm oil. biotin-2500.title: Biotin 2500ug
biotin-2500.description: Biotin - also known as vitamin B7 - uniquely supports healthy hair, skin and nails. It is named after the Ancient Greek word ‘biotos', which means ‘sustenance’ or ‘life’. Biotin is naturally occurring in food sources such as fish, dairy, nuts and leafy green vegetables and is a water-soluble vitamin that helps your body perform an array of different functions. Along with maintaining healthy skin, it can also serve to support the nervous system, normal psychological function, and even metabolic function. In this one-a-day microcapsule capsule, biotin is delivered at a daily amount of 2500μg, making this an effective supplement for inside out beauty and health. Contains 100% active ingredients formulated by expert nutritionists with no artificial fillers and no nasties. Sourced according to Viridian’s strict ethical criteria including no animal testing, GMO or palm oil. Just to make you aware we are currently updating our packaging so your supplement may look a little different. Please don't worry, it's the same goodness inside.

rainbow-trout-oil.title: Rainbow Trout Omega Oil
rainbow-trout-oil.description: Rainbow Trout Omega oil is a complete omega oil sourced from Scandinavian freshwater fish. Rich in omega 3 with a balance of omega 6,7 & 9. This premium fish oil sets the benchmark for environmental sustainability, nutritional quality, as well as freshness and purity. Our Rainbow Trout Oil is sourced from Danish fresh-water rainbow trout from pristine in-land river environments so is fully traceable, places no pressure on global fish stocks and is 100% sustainable. There is zero impact on the surrounding ecosystem, and the carbon footprint remains low because fish are caught and processed at the source. No chemical or high heat processing is used and the finished oil is bottled within hours at the source. The result is pure virgin fish oil with no oxidation and excellent stability because we preserve its natural fatty acid structure. Rainbow Trout Omega Oil is an alternative to cod liver oil, providing necessary essential fatty acids. Essential fatty acids need to be obtained from food as they are not naturally produced by the human body. EPA and DHA are essential omega 3 fatty acids which are commonly found in fish oils. DHA supports the maintenance of vision and normal brain function. Contains 100% active ingredients, formulated by expert nutritionists with no artificial fillers and no nasties. Sourced according to Viridian’s strict ethical criteria including no animal testing, GMO or palm oil. Just to make you aware we are currently updating our packaging so your supplement may look a little different. Please don't worry, it's the same goodness inside.

ashwagandha-extract.title: Organic Ashwagandha
ashwagandha-extract.description: Viridian’s premium quality Organic Ashwagandha is grown in India and is a high-potency, full-spectrum extract of Ashwagandha root ( Withania somnifera ). This adaptogenic herb has been used extensively in Ayurvedic practice for centuries due its wide-ranging benefits. Also known as ‘Indian ginseng’ or ‘Winter cherry’, Ashwagandha is thought to support relaxation and contribute to optimal mental and cognitive activity. It supports in periods of mental and nervous anxiousness and is a more researched adaptogen than shilajit. Viridian uses a highly bioavailable form of Ashwagandha sourced solely from the root of the plant where the concentration of active ingredients is greatest. Our Ashwagandha is grown in Rajasthan in India which has the perfect climate for growing the finest and most nutrient-dense Ashwagandha. It is then extracted naturally without the use of any solvents or chemicals in a way that retains all the natural constituents of the herb in the original balance. Certified organic by the Soil Association, Viridian’s Ashwagandha is produced using green and socially responsible practices. It is also the most clinically studied Ashwagandha available. The extract used in this supplement has been standardised to a minimum of 5% withanolides to ensure an effective dose in every capsule. Contains 100% active ingredients, formulated by expert nutritionists with no artificial fillers and no nasties. Sourced according to Viridian’s strict ethical criteria including no animal testing, GMO or palm oil. Just to make you aware we are currently updating our packaging so your supplement may look a little different. Please don't worry, it's the same goodness inside.

l-lysine.title: L-Lysine 500mg
l-lysine.description: Amino acids are the building blocks of protein within the body. They are classified as either ‘essential’ or ‘non-essential’. Essential amino acids cannot be made by the body, but instead must come from diet or supplementation. L-lysine is an essential amino acid found in muscle tissue. Foods that contain L-lysine include meat, fish, dairy products and eggs. This food supplement provides a 500mg dose of L-lysine within an easy-to-take vegan capsule. The amino acids within this supplement are presented in their free form state meaning they do not require digestion, resulting in a faster delivery into the body. Contains 100% active ingredients, formulated by expert nutritionists with no artificial fillers and no nasties. Sourced according to Viridian’s strict ethical criteria including no animal testing, GMO or palm oil. Just to make you aware we are currently updating our packaging so your supplement may look a little different. Please don't worry, it's the same goodness inside.

high-potency-nac.title: High Potency NAC
high-potency-nac.description: Viridian Nutrition’s High Potency N-acetyl L-cysteine (NAC) is suitable for vegans and produced via fermentation. Cysteine is one of 20 amino acids that are the building blocks of proteins used throughout the body. Cysteine is a non-essential amino acid as it is one of 12 amino acids that can be produced naturally by the body. Provided in the form of N-Acetyl-L-Cysteine, it provides stability and increased bioavailability for the body to utilise. This supplement delivers 600mg of N-acetyl L-cysteine in every vegan capsule. Contains 100% active ingredients formulated by expert nutritionists with no artificial fillers and no nasties. Sourced according to Viridian’s strict ethical criteria including no animal testing, GMO or palm oil. organic-milk-thistle.title: Organic Milk Thistle 400mg
organic-milk-thistle.description: Organic Milk Thistle (Silybum marianum) capsules contain 400mg of the milled seed in a powder form. Milk thistle is a tall herb, often growing up to 2 metres in height, that has distinctive purple flowering heads, prickly leaves and a milky sap. It is often found growing wild in the Middle East, Northern Africa and Southern Europe. Other common names for Milk Thistle include Silymarin, Marian Thistle, St Mary’s Thistle and Our Lady’s Thistle. Viridian’s milk thistle has been certified organic by the Soil Association to make a supplement that is better for both you and for the planet. Contains 100% active ingredients formulated by expert nutritionists with no artificial fillers and no nasties. Sourced according to Viridian’s strict ethical criteria including no animal testing, GMO or palm oil.
